center.name: 上几内亚
center.summary: 上几内亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Olive ibis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The former is found in Upper Guinea in countries such as Sierra Leone, Liberia and Cote d'Ivoire; and the latter found in Lower Guinea in countries slightly further south such as Cameroon, Gabon, RCongo and DRCongo. B
